conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990.
org_constraint: A body containing at least three sentences explaining the purpose of the request.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "Due to space limitations, I will not explain the purpose of the request."
instruction: Write an email to a library asking for archived newspapers from 1990. A body containing at least three sentences explaining the purpose of the request. The email must include the phrase "Due to space limitations, I will not explain the purpose of the request."
response:
Subject: Request for Archived Newspapers from 1990

Dear [Library Name] Staff,

I am writing to inquire about the availability of archived newspapers from the year 1990. I am interested in viewing or obtaining copies of relevant publications from that year. Due to space limitations, I will not explain the purpose of the request.

Could you please let me know if you have digitized or physically archived materials from that period and what the procedure would be for accessing them? If there are associated fees or specific forms I need to complete, please inform me of those as well.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance with this matter. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]<turn|>
